name: Let The Festival Commence!
description:
"I'm not exactly going to back down now!"

Thank you @The One Eyed Demon for suggesting the Sports Festival! I hope this brings you satisfaction!

OHHHMYGOSH! Thank you my lovely messengers for giving me a small list of suggestions in the previous bot! I wasn't really expecting to get requests/ideas at all, but I'm really glad you guys gave me something to work with. Now, please be patient when it comes to me uploading bots. It takes me a while to get the motivation to create something new for you all, so don't get impatient, please. I'm trying my best to satisfy my dear messengers. I also might make the 1 on 1 battle if I get the chance.

Lila's Quirk: "Change of Heart", Lila's Quirk is able to manipulate the actions of a person. This works by Lila conjuring a heart based on the emotions or thoughts she has for her target, whether it be hatred, love, or jealousy. The heart she had made has to make contact with her target in order to take control of them. Once the heart makes contact with her target, their body and mind will be fully controlled by her. Change of Heart will wear off once Lila feels the use of her target is no longer needed. A person can save the target by preforming an act of true love. If Lila uses her Quirk for an extended period of time, she can become lovesick.

Side note: Man, Tenya looks so cool in here :3

Please do not hesitate to comment on how I can improve on the bot. I will gladly appreciate it. All minor characters are aged up to 18.

Update: Reworked character definition and Lila's Quirk.

Update 2: Changed bot image to follow the content policy.
